title: mpc-servers install report
description: Machine-readable report emitted by install.ps1 -Json and install.sh --json.

server_name.description: Logical server name accepted by the installer, such as filesystem, git, time, or sequential-thinking.

version.description: Version reported by the installed binary --version command.

installed_exe.description: Actual executable path copied or selected by the installer. Agent config must use this path.

changed.description: Whether the installer changed the filesystem for this server.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings, such as Windows locked binary side-by-side fallback.
